'''Danny Russell''' (born 24 December 1969) is a former [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at representative level for [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland]], playing at the [[2000 Rugby League World Cup]], and at club level for [[Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles]], [[Carlisle RLFC|Carlisle]] and [[Huddersfield Giants|Huddersfield]], as a {{rlp|hk}}.

==International honours==
Russell won [[Cap (sport)|cap]]s for [[Scotland national rugby league team|Scotland]] while at Carlisle, and Huddersfield 1996...2000 9-caps.
